{\centering\Large\bfseries Vozz Rich Electronic Press Kit \\

\footnotesize Updated: February 2025\par}  

\section*{🎤 Artist Overview}  
Vozz Rich electrifies the global dance scene as a Mexican-Californian producer/DJ blending Detroit house, Latin rhythms, and techno intensity into chart-topping dancefloor alchemy. 🌎 His signature fusion of underground rave energy with Latin percussion and big-room euphoria has generated:  
\begin{itemize}  
\item 24,778+ monthly Spotify listeners with 15\% monthly growth  
\item Beatport Progressive House Top 50 placement (\textit{Butterflies Remix})  
\item 729K+ LastFM listener footprint across 15 countries  
\end{itemize}  
Recent collaborations with L25, Kicevski, and Artsychoke demonstrate his versatility in crafting peak-time anthems with cross-continental appeal.  

\section*{📊 Performance \& Audience Insights}  
\begin{itemize}  
\item \textbf{Streaming Momentum:}  
  - 25K+ average plays per release  
  - 4,109 Spotify followers  
  - Charted on Spotify's \textit{House Heat} + Apple Music's \textit{New Fire}  
\item \textbf{Social Presence:}  
  - 4,875 Instagram followers (@vozzrich)  
  - Viral SoundCloud edits (\textit{Sofi Disco} remix)  
\item \textbf{Market Penetration:}  
  - Core Markets: Los Angeles, Detroit, Miami  
  - Emerging Growth: Mexico City, Buenos Aires, Madrid  
\end{itemize}  

\section*{🎧 Discography Highlights (2024-2025)}  
\subsection*{Original Productions}  
\begin{itemize}  
\item \textit{Breathless} (with L25) – Melodic house with Latin vocal hooks  
\item \textit{House Ablaze} – Peak-time techno weapon  
\item \textit{Mi Corazon Batalla} – Latin house fusion showcase  
\end{itemize}  

\subsection*{Notable Remixes}  
\begin{itemize}  
\item Artsychoke – \textit{Butterflies} (Beatport Top 50)  
\item Jaytor – \textit{Dance All Night} (Festival rework)  
\item Kelly Reverb \& Chad LeMans – \textit{Let This One Ride}  
\end{itemize}  

\section*{🎪 Live Experience \& Technical}  
\subsection*{Performance Formats}
